title: Add YAML theme support
description: In this existing Swift package (Rainbow), add a Theme feature using the Yams SwiftPM dependency. Add Sources/Theme.swift with a Theme type that loads a YAML role->color mapping, and String.applyingTheme(_:role:). Add Tests/RainbowTests/ThemeTests.swift. Done when swift build succeeds and swift test --enable-test-discovery passes. Use --enable-test-discovery (legacy LinuxMain.swift present).
